_comment: IMP-067 demonstration input: governed BA-owned assumption with verbatim local basis. The runtime validates the quote, writes assumptions.md, and refreshes knowledge_state with ASSUMED units.

assumptions.statement: The first dashboard slice will provisionally use the existing ticket metrics source for ticket volume, resolution time, and backlog ageing.
assumptions.justification: They want to see ticket volume, resolution time, and backlog ageing in one screen.
